sql_array: CREATE TABLE sequences_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, my_sequence_name INTEGER DEFAULT nextval('my_sequence'));
SELECT currval('my_sequence_name') AS curr_value, xor('101'::BITSTRING, '111'::BITSTRING) AS xor_value FROM sequences_table;
SELECT id, currval('my_sequence_name') + xor('010'::BITSTRING, '000'::BITSTRING) AS combined_value FROM sequences_table;

WITH sequence_values AS (SELECT currval('my_sequence_name') AS current_val, xor('110'::BITSTRING, '101'::BITSTRING) AS xor_result FROM sequences_table) SELECT current_val, xor_result FROM sequence_values;
CREATE TABLE test_data (num_value INTEGER, str_value VARCHAR, flag BITSTRING);
INSERT INTO test_data (num_value, str_value, flag) VALUES (1, 'test', '1'::BITSTRING);
INSERT INTO test_data (num_value, str_value, flag) VALUES (NULL, NULL, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_data (num_value, str_value, flag) VALUES (2147483647, 'max', '0'::BITSTRING);
SELECT num_value, str_value, xor(flag, '1'::BITSTRING) AS modified_flag FROM test_data WHERE num_value XOR 1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT currval('my_sequence_name'), CASE WHEN str_value IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS null_check FROM test_data) AS subquery GROUP BY null_check HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT currval('my_sequence_name'), xor(num_value::BITSTRING, '000'::BITSTRING) AS xor_value FROM test_data WHERE num_value > 0;
SELECT 1 / NULL AS division_result, currval('my_sequence_name') FROM sequences_table WHERE NULL XOR '110'::BITSTRING = '110'::BITSTRING;
ALTER TABLE sequences_table ADD COLUMN another_value VARCHAR;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT currval('my_sequence_name') AS temp_curr, xor('001'::BITSTRING, '111'::BITSTRING) AS temp_xor FROM sequences_table;
